title: TensorFoundry LLM Rate Card
description: Per-model pricing and capability metadata for the LLM provider ecosystem. Published as a signed JSON artefact at github.com/tensorfoundrylabs/llm-rate-card.

schema_version.description: Semver of the rate-card schema this document conforms to.

attribution.description: Upstream sources whose licences require credit. Carried in the artefact so downstream consumers inherit the obligation.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code. All per-million figures in this document are denominated in this currency.

version.description: Calendar version tag, yyyy.mm.dd or yyyy.mm.dd-N for same-day reissues.

source_commit.description: Git commit SHA of the generator that produced this artefact.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 over the canonicalised models array. Used to decide whether a new release is warranted.

key.description: Lookup key, <provider>:<model_id>. Stable identity across releases.

model_id.description: Provider-native identifier as accepted by the provider's API.

input_per_million.description: Price per 1M input tokens, in the document currency.

cache_read_per_million.description: Discounted read price for cached input tokens. Null if the provider does not offer caching for this model.

cache_write_per_million.description: Premium write price for populating the cache. Distinct from read price; some providers charge more to write than to read.

reasoning_per_million.description: Price for reasoning tokens emitted by the model. Null for non-reasoning models.

pricing_tiers.description: Above-threshold pricing for models with tiered rates (long-context Gemini, large-context Claude, etc.). Tiers apply when the input prompt exceeds above_input_tokens.

context_window.description: Max input tokens the model accepts.

deprecation_date.description: Date the provider sunsets the model. Null if no sunset announced.

verified.description: Date a maintainer last confirmed this entry against the provider's pricing page. Carried forward across automated runs unless price changed.

sources.description: Source identifiers contributing to this entry, e.g. litellm, anthropic-direct, openrouter.

source_url.description: Optional link to the canonical pricing page for traceability.

provider.description: Provider identifier. Canonical known values are listed in registries.json; the schema accepts any snake_case identifier.

mode.description: Inference mode. Canonical known values are listed in registries.json; the schema accepts any snake_case identifier.

capability.description: Model capability flag. Canonical known values are listed in registries.json; the schema accepts any snake_case identifier.
